_meta.source: TATA IPL 2025 Auction List PDF (15.12.24) + public auction results (Nov 24-25, 2024)
notes: RTM was not available in IPL 2025 mega auction.

Retention prices and post-retention purse figures sourced from public records and corrected where the input template was inaccurate (notably: GT's Rabada was bought at auction, not retained; SRH retained 5 capped players including Travis Head and Nitish Kumar Reddy).
Jofra Archer was added via the supplementary registration list and is included as a player entry.

Some uncapped/associate players who registered but were sold at base price are marked accordingly; commonly reported unsold marquee names (e.g. David Warner, Jonny Bairstow, Kane Williamson, Mustafizur Rahman) appear with auctionStatus="unsold".

Retention contract prices (retentionPrice) and post-retention purse (startingPurse / purseAfterRetention) both reflect publicly reported figures. For KKR and DC, contract values sum to more than the actual purse deduction because uncapped retentions used a discounted slab (4 cr contract vs lower purse impact); the published purseAfterRetention is authoritative.
